mapper.select: SELECT MOVIE_ID , (SELECT P.POSTER_PATH FROM POSTER P WHERE P.POSTER_GROUP_ID = #{movieId}) AS POSTER_URL , TITLE , MOVIE_RATING , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI:SS') AS OPEN_DATE , OPEN_COUNTRY , RUNNING_TIME , INTRODUCE , SYNOPSIS , ORIGINAL_TITLE , MOVIE_STATE , LANGUAGE , BUDGET , PROFIT FROM MOVIE ORDER BY MOVIE_ID ASC

SELECT M.MOVIE_ID , M.POSTER_URL , M.TITLE , M.MOVIE_RATING , M.OPEN_DATE , M.OPEN_COUNTRY , M.RUNNING_TIME , M.INTRODUCE , M.SYNOPSIS , M.ORIGINAL_TITLE , M.MOVIE_STATE , M.LANGUAGE , M.BUDGET , M.PROFIT , P.POSTER_NUM , P.POSTER_GROUP_ID , P.OBFUSCATE_NAME , P.DISPLAY_NAME , P.EXTEND_NAME , P.POSTER_LENGTH , P.POSTER_PATH FROM MOVIE M LEFT OUTER JOIN POSTER P ON M.MOVIE_ID = P.POSTER_GROUP_ID WHERE M.MOVIE_ID = #{articleId}
